lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.
Note: the 4.0 engine moved the site — use the Live coordinate (50.5322, 137.4363); the old 44.818, -31.389 is the Legacy/Horizons location.

sources.label: r/EliteDangerous (CMDR Loch147)
sources.what: Annotated overhead map of the ten drop points and what spawns at each — the image reproduced in Section 4.

sources.label: Frontier Forums
sources.what: Pictorial drop-point list — which Manufactured Material sits at each of the ten salvage points.

sources.label: Redshift
sources.what: Dav's Hope farming walkthrough — clockwise SRV loop and relog reset routine.

sources.label: Lars Bodin
sources.what: Material-farming reference cross-checking the site location and trade structure.

sources.label: AXI Wiki
sources.what: Manufactured-material gathering and the trade-down / sideways conversion method.

sources.label: Video guide
sources.what: Video reference for the SRV circuit and relog routine.

sources.label: Inara — Dav's Hope
sources.what: Database station entry for Dav's Hope in Hyades Sector DR-V c2-23 — the settlement location itself.

sources.label: Fandom Wiki
sources.what: Dav's Hope settlement layout and salvageable Manufactured Materials.

sources.label: YouTube — The Buur Pit
sources.what: Gameplay walkthrough: locating the settlement, running the SRV material-canister circuit, scanning the data point, and relogging to respawn.

sources.label: YouTube — Down to Earth Astronomy
sources.what: Covers updates to Dav's Hope and an alternative material-farming location, with coordinates and route notes.
